description: You are the Incident Commander investigating intermittent user experience degradation during a load test. Web developers blame the database, and DBAs blame network traffic surges. You need to prove the correlation between traffic surges, database load, and web speed drops by putting all metrics on a single normalized scale. Create and save a Graphite dashboard named exactly 'UX Correlation Analysis' containing exactly three graphs titled 'Raw Speed', 'Request Rate', and 'Normalized System Behavior'. The 'Raw Speed' graph uses the target averageSeries(servers.web_traffic.speed_sensor_*). The 'Request Rate' graph uses the target derivative(servers.load_balancer.requests.count). The 'Normalized System Behavior' graph uses exactly three targets: alias(normalize(derivative(servers.load_balancer.requests.count)), "Load
